data.name: Tap 4 Sex 2
data.detailed_description:
The heat is back—Tap 4 Sex 2 takes everything you loved from the first game and cranks it up to the max! 

Get ready for new girls, more steamy animations, and an even wilder tapping experience that will leave you wanting more.


What’s new in Tap 4 Sex 2?

  • A brand-new lineup of stunning, seductive girls waiting to react to your every click.

  • More animations, more poses, more heat—every scene has been upgraded to bring you closer than ever.

  • Improved sound and visual effects that make every moment more electrifying.

  • Expanded gallery filled with exclusive, jaw-dropping content you won’t find anywhere else.

  • Even smoother, more addictive gameplay—because once you start tapping, you won’t want to stop.




Tap 4 Sex 2 delivers everything you asked for: hotter models, more variety, and double the action.
If you thought the first game was addictive, this sequel will completely hook you.


💋 More girls. More clicks. More pleasure.
Your next irresistible adventure starts here—are you ready to tap your way to the ultimate gallery?

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Quad Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Quad Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
